data.title: Amazon, Tesla, Oracle to reveal Bolivia investments next month as country ends socialist era
data.description:
Bolivia’s President Rodrigo Paz announced Tuesday that several large American technology firms plan to reveal investment plans in the country soon. Speaking at a press conference held online, Paz said company representatives from Tesla, Amazon and Oracle will travel to Bolivia in January to share details about their technology investments. The plans include building data […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/amazon-tesla-oracle-to-reveal-bolivia-investments-next-month-as-country-ends-socialist-era/
